---
title: "Moinul Islam"
output: 
 html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 1
    #code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,warning=FALSE, cache=TRUE)
```


I am Dr. Moinul Islam, working as an assistant professor at Kochi University of Technology. I have received my Ph.D. in engineering degree from Kyushu University in 2016. My research focuses are environmental science, environmental economics, experimental economics, and spatial economics.

# Research focus
The research method focuses on the following three points.

1. Environmental Science 
2. Environmental Economics
3. Experimental Economics
4. Spatial Economics

I have extensive experience to conduct experimental research by using the methods of online experiment, field experiment and laboratory experiment. Based on the experimental data analysis, my goal is to identify and develop suitable policy framework that will contribute to the policies for sustainable environments and societies. 

# Experiences


**Working Experience**

- 2020, Assistant Professor, Research Institute for Future Design, Kochi University of Technology, Kochi, Japan

- 2019, Assistant Professor, Graduate School for International Development and Cooperation (IDEC), Hiroshima University, Hiroshima, Japan 

- 2016, Assistant Professor, Graduate School of Urban and Environmental Engineering, Kyushu University, Fukuoka, Japan 

- 2012, Research Assistant, Graduate School of Environmental Studies, Tohoku University, Sendai, Japan   


**Computer program**

- R, Python

- STATA, EViews 

- ArcGIS, QGIS 

- oTree, zTree

- GNU Emacs


**Language**

English (Fluent), Japanese (Fluent), Hindi (Fluent), Bengali (Native)


**External link**

1. Kochi University of Technology: (https://www.kochi-tech.ac.jp/profile/ja/islam-moinul.html)

2. Publons: (https://publons.com/researcher/4127115/moinul-islam/)

3. Google Scholar: (https://scholar.google.co.jp/citations?user=UTZTmJ0AAAAJ&hl=en)

4. Scopus: (https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55348122400)

5. Research Map: (https://researchmap.jp/moinul/?lang=english)

6. ORCID: (https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0309-3156)


**Affiliation**

1. Research Institute for Future Design, Kochi University of Technology, 2-22 Eikokuji, Kochi City, Kochi 780-8515, Japan

2. School of Economics and Management, Kochi University of Technology, 2-22 Eikokuji, Kochi City, Kochi 780-8518, Japan

3. Urban Institute, Kyushu University, Fukuoka, Japan

</div>
<div class="col-sm-4">
##### [Me]
<a href = "https://crumplab.github.io">
![](images/profile_1.jpeg)
</a>
</div>
